title: aster × handelii
intro: Aster × handelii, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Aster ericoides and Aster dumosus, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Aster × handelii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
